name: CRISPR Cloning Oligo Designer
description: Designs top and bottom strand DNA oligos for cloning a CRISPR protospacer into a restriction-digested vector. When organism or target_reference is provided, the protospacer is verified against a downloaded local reference sequence before oligos are returned. The result includes construction_file_inputs that can be passed directly to create_construction_file.

inputs.name: protospacer
inputs.description: The DNA protospacer sequence to clone (20 bp for Cas9, 23 bp for Cas12a). Raw DNA string only — A, T, G, C bases.

inputs.name: vector
inputs.description: Optional known vector name. Supported values include px330, lenticrispr_v2, pdr274, pcrispr, pET28a, and pBR322. If omitted, local references choose defaults when available: ecoli_rpsl uses pcrispr.

inputs.name: top_overhang
inputs.description: 5' overhang for the top strand oligo, determined by the restriction enzyme used to linearize the vector. Default is 'CACC' for BbsI-digested pX330.

inputs.name: bottom_overhang
inputs.description: 5' overhang for the bottom strand oligo. Default is 'AAAC' for BbsI-digested pX330.

inputs.name: prepend_g
inputs.description: Optional override for adding a 5' G when promoter compatibility requires it. If omitted, the selected vector controls this behavior.

inputs.name: organism
inputs.description: Optional organism name or alias. Supported local references include E. coli rpsL. If supplied, the protospacer must be found in the local reference.

inputs.name: target_reference
inputs.description: Optional explicit local target reference name. Supported value is ecoli_rpsl. If supplied, the protospacer must be found in that local reference.

inputs.name: construct_name
inputs.description: Optional final construct name to include in construction_file_inputs.

outputs.description: A dictionary with top_oligo, bottom_oligo, g_prepended, final_protospacer, target_verification, and construction_file_inputs. construction_file_inputs is ready for create_construction_file.
